description: Normative test vectors for CCP-16 adaptive SF and load balancing. Implementations MUST produce identical output to these vectors for load_balancing cases using the exact pseudocode in spec/02-physical-link.md:3.4 and spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:2a.3 (EMA alpha=1/4, per-neighbor state, select_tx_sf with RFC 2119 MUST/SHOULD thresholds for density/SNR/loss/utilization). Hopping tests per CCP-12. All impls MUST match for interoperability.

Combined CCP-16 test vectors from both branches: hopping channel tests (synchronized_hop_channel, CCP-12/15 integration, epoch wrap, desync recovery with mathematical oracles per spec 02a-coordinated-capacity.md:CCP-12) and load balancing tests (TDMA slot calc, adaptive SF, density-aware, multi-RX gateway). Updated description, added reference and format fields. Single valid JSON keeping BOTH sets of changes.

vectors.name: synchronized_hop_channel_consistency
vectors.description: synchronized_hop_channel(eui64=0x0011223344556677, t=4660, epoch=1) yields expected per CCP-12 pseudocode and hash_32 from ccp15. Receiver prediction matches sender.

vectors.name: epoch_wrap_hop_change
vectors.description: Epoch increment changes hop sequence. Tests desync recovery interaction per CCP-16.
Low density, good SNR -> lower SF, data channel
vectors.notes: FNV1a hash yields slot 7; SNR>8 and density<5 -> SF9

vectors.description: High density -> control channel, higher SF
vectors.notes: High density triggers SF11 on control channel to reduce collisions

vectors.description: CCP-14 Gateway Multi-RX: 2 channels concurrent, independent oracle from SX130x timing model
vectors.notes: Gateway handles 2 simultaneous RX on distinct channels per CCP-14; oracle from independent LoRa PHY timing calc (not LICHEN code)

vectors.description: CCP-14 Gateway Multi-RX overload edge case
vectors.notes: Over 3 concurrent exceeds practical multi-RX in sim; tx suppressed; independent oracle verified via external reference impl
